title: 言葉はノンノン♪　ボディで語るの！

text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking through the central plaza,
I hear a huge argument unfolding.

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Are you seriously looking down on races in
Japan?

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
No... I just think it's obviously better if you can
compete overseas as well.

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! You're saying domestic races aren't good
enough!

The conversation seems rather heated. Just as I
think that I should step in...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hey! That's enough, you two. Let's take it down a
notch, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I think I know what went wrong here. At first, you
were comparing the virtues of races in Japan to
those abroad...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But then your passion swelled, and before you
knew it, your emotions got the better of you.

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yeah, because she said—

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, I know. Calm down, please.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Now then, it's true that there are a lot of
differences between Japanese and international
races.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure it's also true that, wherever the race
is, every participant wants to do their very best.
Don't you think that puts them on the same level?

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, perhaps it's a bit challenging to put into
words. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I've got a plan! Start the music!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's put those hard-to-say feelings into
song! Express them with your body!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Sing! Dance! Move at your own pace and find
your groove! Try to convey your feelings to each
other! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Convey our feelings...

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Okay. I, uh, want to keep competing with you!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's it! Move to the rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Worldly Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I don't care whether it's domestic or
overseas! As long as I'm with you, my life is
exhilarating!

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes, me too! You're my one and only rival! You make my heart race!

text_block_list.name: Patriotic Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Look, I'm really sorry! Let's keep writing our story together!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ah, beautiful! Beautiful! You poured your hearts
out!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Now that's... friendship!

And so, Seeking the Pearl's unique method of
conflict resolution helps the two students
reconcile.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now that their problems are solved, how
about you?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You look like you have something to say. Come
on, communicate with your body!
While I'm not particularly dissatisfied with my recent performance, I do want to grow even more as a trainer!

With that in mind, I sing loud enough to set my
soul on fire!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, perfect! Louder! Let it all out! Go beyond
your limits! Higher! Higher!
While I'm not particularly dissatisfied with my recent life, I am sick of feeling tired all the time!

With that in mind, I dance so wildly that I can feel
the fatigue leaving my soul!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yes, dump all that fatigue! Abandon your fears!
Dance the night away!

Now that I think about it... I have no complaints
about anything! I'm completely happy with who I
am right now!

With that in mind, I strike a pose and feel even
more satisfied with my life!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ah, perfect! Impeccable! Magnificent!
